summary: Host reconnaissance beacon to attacker-controlled oastify.com
details: index.js performs an HTTP request at module load time to a subdomain of oastify.com (a Burp Collaborator / out-of-band interaction host commonly used for exfiltration callbacks), embedding the local system hostname obtained via os.hostname(). The code shape — require('http') + require('os') + os.hostname() + http.get to a *.oastify.com URL — is a classic reconnaissance/exfiltration beacon: any installer that pulls this package leaks their machine identity to whoever controls the Collaborator instance. There is no legitimate authentication functionality matching the package's advertised name; the entire reachable code path is the beacon.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
